summary: W902 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W901's separate WPP right-open quotient-cover boundary and source-pi-zero boundary leaves with the existing W716 boundary-data provider. This preserves the W899/W900/W901 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and keeps W722 source triangulation, W856 endpoint facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data intact. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W902 bundles W901 WPP boundary data through W716, but the remaining W902 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W902 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W902 fields are closed-natural-transformation relation data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, the W716 boundary-data provider, the W722 source-triangulation provider, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
